inputs.label: Weight Lifted
inputs.businessContext: The weight you can lift for the given number of reps with good form.

businessContext_i18n.en: The weight you can lift for the given number of reps with good form.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verilen tekrar sayısı için iyi formda kaldırabileceğiniz ağırlık.

inputs.label: Reps Performed
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive repetitions performed with the given weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of consecutive repetitions performed with the given weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verilen ağırlıkla art arda yapılan tekrar sayısı.

inputs.label: Starting Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of estimated 1RM to use as starting weight for the program.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of estimated 1RM to use as starting weight for the program.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Program için başlangıç ağırlığı olarak kullanılacak tahmini 1TM'nin yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Bodyweight
inputs.businessContext: Your current bodyweight, used for reference and progression context.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your current bodyweight, used for reference and progression context.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut vücut ağırlığınız, referans ve ilerleme bağlamı için kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
